title: zombie siege (Guns in minecraft loot chests)
description: adds guns to minecraft loot tables may eventually add to modded loot tables.
body:
join my discord to report bugs and help support me [Day of the Dead Discord server](https://discord.gg/PAHCrH5uPT)

 

1.1.5

changed the chance of not getting a gun to around 25% - 33%
and changed the amount of ammo received from a chest to match a more realistic amount.
pistol: 13 - 64
shotguns: 10 - 36
assault rifles: 16 - 64
smgs: 32 - 64
snipers: 6 - 20
machine guns: 64 - 256

 

1.1.4

integration with:
ExtinctionZ,
Underground Bunkers,
Zombie survival kit.

 

1.1.2 - Zombie Extreme compatabilty

only adds guns to chest not other containers

 

Explore the world and scavenge through various loot chests, dungeons, and structures to uncover valuable firearms and ammunition. Firearms are seamlessly integrated into the game's existing loot tables, providing a sense of excitement and unpredictability as players uncover new weapons on their adventures.

 

 

Engage in adrenaline-fueled combat encounters with hostile mobs, rival players, and formidable bosses as you put your newfound firepower to the test. From close-quarters skirmishes to long-range sniper duels, every firefight is a pulse-pounding test of skill and strategy.

 

 

"Zombie siege loot table mod" offers an exhilarating and action-packed Minecraft experience, elevating the game's combat mechanics with the addition of firearms and ammunition to loot tables. Will you embrace the power of firepower and emerge victorious in the chaotic world of Minecraft, or will you fall victim to the relentless onslaught of your adversaries? The choice is yours. 

 

1.20.1 requires vic's pointblank
